root.name: add
tip: Schedule files, directories, or symbolic links for addition to the repository.

option.name: --auto-props
tip: Use auto-props to set default properties on newly added files.

option.name: --depth
tip: Limit the depth of the operation.
Valid values: empty, files, immediates, infinity

option.name: --force
tip: Force addition of files that are already part of a parent's depth-limited.

option.name: --no-auto-props
tip: Disable auto-props for this add operation.

option.name: --no-ignore
tip: Disregard default and svn:ignore property-ignored files when performing the add.

option.name: --non-recursive
tip: Operate on a single directory without recursion.

option.name: --parents
tip: Create any missing parent directories for the files being added.

option.name: --quiet
tip: Print nothing, or just summary information.

root.name: auth
tip: List, remove, or flush cached authentication information.

option.name: --clear
tip: Remove the cached credentials for the specified realm.

root.name: cat
tip: Output the contents of specified files or URLs.

root.name: changelist
tip: Associate (or de-associate) local paths with a changelist.

option.name: --depth
tip: Limit the depth of the operation.

option.name: --quiet
tip: Print nothing, or just summary information.

option.name: --remove
tip: Remove the changelist association from the specified paths.

root.name: checkout
tip: Check out a working copy from a repository.

option.name: --depth
tip: Valid values: empty, files, immediates, infinity

option.name: --force
tip: Force checkout even if the target directory is not empty.

option.name: --non-recursive
tip: Operate on a single directory without recursion.

option.name: --quiet
tip: Print nothing, or just summary information.

root.name: cleanup
tip: Recursively clean up the working copy, removing locks, resuming unfinished operations, etc.

option.name: --dry-run
tip: Show what would be cleaned without actually doing it.

option.name: --fix-anchors
tip: Fix the depth of tree-conflict victim root nodes.

option.name: --include-externals
tip: Also operate on externals defined by svn:externals.

option.name: --remove-ignored
tip: Remove all ignored files and directories from the working copy.

option.name: --remove-unversioned
tip: Remove all unversioned files and directories from the working copy.

root.name: commit
tip: Send changes from your working copy to the repository.

option.name: --encoding
tip: Treat the value passed to --message as being in the specified encoding.

option.name: --file
tip: Read the log message from the specified file.

option.name: --file
tip: Read a log message from a file.

option.name: --force-log
tip: Force the log message to be treated as literal text, even if it starts with a -.

option.name: --keep-changelists
tip: Do not remove items from changelists after committing.

option.name: --message
tip: Specify the commit message directly on the command line.

option.name: --quiet
tip: Print nothing, or just summary information.

option.name: --revision
tip: Specify a revision (not useful for commit, but used by other commands).

root.name: copy
tip: Copy and schedule for addition (with history).

option.name: --quiet
tip: Print nothing, or just summary information.

option.name: --revision
tip: Specify a revision to copy from.

root.name: delete
tip: Delete items from the working copy or the repository.

option.name: --keep-local
tip: Keep the file in working copy after it is scheduled for deletion.

option.name: --non-recursive
tip: Operate on a single directory without recursion.

option.name: --quiet
tip: Print nothing, or just summary information.

root.name: diff
tip: Display the differences between two revisions or paths.

option.name: --change
tip: Show the changes introduced by a specific revision.

option.name: --depth
tip: Limit the depth of the operation.

option.name: --new
tip: Specify the new file/directory for diff.

option.name: --non-recursive
tip: Operate on a single directory without recursion.

option.name: --old
tip: Specify the old file/directory for diff.

option.name: --summarize
tip: Show a summary of changed paths.

root.name: export
tip: Create an unversioned copy of a tree.

option.name: --depth
tip: Limit the depth of the operation.

option.name: --native-eol
tip: Use the specified EOL style for exported files.

root.name: help
tip: Describe available subcommands or one specific subcommand.

root.name: import
tip: Import a file or directory tree into the repository.

option.name: --file
tip: Read a log message from a file.

option.name: --force-log
tip: Force the log message to be treated as literal text.

option.name: --no-auto-props
tip: Disable auto-props for this import operation.

option.name: --quiet
tip: Print nothing, or just summary information.

root.name: info
tip: Display information about local or remote items.

option.name: --depth
tip: Limit the depth of the operation.

option.name: --revision
tip: Specify a revision to get info for.

option.name: --show-item
tip: Show the info of the TARGET item only.

root.name: list
tip: List directory entries in the repository.

option.name: --depth
tip: Limit the depth of the operation.

option.name: --non-recursive
tip: Operate on a single directory without recursion.

root.name: lock
tip: Lock items so other users cannot change them until they are unlocked.

option.name: --encoding
tip: Treat the lock comment as being in the specified encoding.

option.name: --file
tip: Read a lock comment from a file.

option.name: --quiet
tip: Print nothing, or just summary information.

root.name: log
tip: Show the log messages for a set of revision(s) and/or file(s).

option.name: --change
tip: Show the log for a specific change.

option.name: --depth
tip: Limit the depth of the operation.

option.name: --limit
tip: Maximum number of log messages to output.

option.name: --quiet
tip: Print nothing, or just summary information.

option.name: --search
tip: Search the log messages for a search pattern.

option.name: --stop-on-copy
tip: Do not cross copies while performing the log.

option.name: --use-merge-history
tip: Show the log of merged changes.

root.name: merge
tip: Merge two different trees into a working copy or repository.

option.name: --accept
tip: Valid values: postpone, base, working, mine-full, theirs-full, edit, launch

option.name: --allow-mixed-revisions
tip: Allow merging into mixed-revision working copy.

option.name: --change
tip: Merge the changes introduced by a specific revision.

option.name: --depth
tip: Limit the depth of the operation.

option.name: --dry-run
tip: Show what would be merged without actually doing it.

option.name: --non-recursive
tip: Operate on a single directory without recursion.

option.name: --quiet
tip: Print nothing, or just summary information.

option.name: --record-only
tip: Record the merge but do not modify the working copy.

root.name: mkdir
tip: Create a new directory under version control.

option.name: --file
tip: Read a log message from a file.

option.name: --quiet
tip: Print nothing, or just summary information.

root.name: patch
tip: Apply a patch to a working copy.

option.name: --dry-run
tip: Show what would be patched without actually doing it.

option.name: --strip
tip: Number of path components to strip from the patch paths.

root.name: praise
tip: Show author and revision information for each line of a file.

option.name: --end-revision
tip: Specify the end revision for blame.

option.name: --reverse-diff
tip: Show blame information as a reverse diff.

option.name: --start-revision
tip: Specify the start revision for blame.

option.name: --use-merge-history
tip: Show blame information from the merge source of merged lines.

option.name: --verbose
tip: Show the full date, author, and revision for each line.

root.name: propdel
tip: Remove a property from files, directories, or revisions.

option.name: --depth
tip: Limit the depth of the operation.

option.name: --quiet
tip: Print nothing, or just summary information.

root.name: propedit
tip: Edit a property with an external editor.

option.name: --encoding
tip: Treat the property value as being in the specified encoding.

option.name: --wait
tip: Wait for the editor to close instead of spawning it.

root.name: propget
tip: Print the value of a property on files, directories, or revisions.

option.name: --changelist
tip: Only operate on items in the specified changelist.

option.name: --depth
tip: Limit the depth of the operation.

option.name: --revprop
tip: Operate on a repository revision property.

option.name: --verbose
tip: Display the property value with the full property name.

root.name: proplist
tip: List all properties on files, directories, or revisions.

option.name: --depth
tip: Limit the depth of the operation.

option.name: --verbose
tip: Show the property values as well.

root.name: propset
tip: Set a property on files, directories, or revisions.

option.name: --encoding
tip: Treat the property value as being in the specified encoding.

option.name: --file
tip: Read the property value from a file.

option.name: --quiet
tip: Print nothing, or just summary information.

root.name: relocate
tip: Relocate the working copy to point to a different repository URL.

option.name: --depth
tip: Limit the depth of the operation.

option.name: --non-recursive
tip: Operate on a single directory without recursion.

option.name: --quiet
tip: Print nothing, or just summary information.

root.name: rename
tip: Move and/or rename something in the working copy or repository.

option.name: --quiet
tip: Print nothing, or just summary information.

root.name: resolve
tip: Resolve conflicting states on a working copy path.

option.name: --accept
tip: Valid values: postpone, base, working, mine-full, theirs-full, edit, launch

option.name: --depth
tip: Limit the depth of the operation.

option.name: --quiet
tip: Print nothing, or just summary information.

root.name: resolved
tip: Remove 'conflicted' state on a working copy path.

option.name: --depth
tip: Limit the depth of the operation.

option.name: --non-recursive
tip: Operate on a single directory without recursion.

option.name: --quiet
tip: Print nothing, or just summary information.

option.name: --changelist
tip: Operate only on items in the specified changelist.

option.name: --depth
tip: Limit the depth of the operation.

option.name: --quiet
tip: Print nothing, or just summary information.

root.name: status
tip: Print the status of working copy files and directories.

option.name: --changelist
tip: Only show items in the specified changelist.

option.name: --depth
tip: Limit the depth of the operation.

option.name: --non-recursive
tip: Operate on a single directory without recursion.

option.name: --show-updates
tip: Show the revision status of the working copy against the repository.

root.name: switch
tip: Update a working copy to a different URL.

option.name: --accept
tip: Valid values: postpone, base, working, mine-full, theirs-full, edit, launch

option.name: --non-recursive
tip: Operate on a single directory without recursion.

option.name: --quiet
tip: Print nothing, or just summary information.

option.name: --revision
tip: Specify a revision to switch to.

root.name: unlock
tip: Unlock items so other users can modify them.

option.name: --changelist
tip: Operate only on items in the specified changelist.

option.name: --quiet
tip: Print nothing, or just summary information.

root.name: update
tip: Bring changes from the repository into the working copy.

option.name: --accept
tip: Valid values: postpone, base, working, mine-full, theirs-full, edit, launch

option.name: --depth
tip: Limit the depth of the operation.
Valid values: empty, files, immediates, infinity

option.name: --non-recursive
tip: Operate on a single directory without recursion.

option.name: --quiet
tip: Print nothing, or just summary information.

root.name: upgrade
tip: Upgrade the working copy format to the latest supported version.
This is needed when the working copy format has changed.

option.name: --depth
tip: Limit the depth of the operation.
Valid values: empty, files, immediates, infinity

option.name: --quiet
tip: Print nothing, or just summary information.

common_option.name: --config-dir
tip: Read user configuration files from the specified directory.

common_option.name: --config-option
tip: Set a user configuration option in the format: FILE:OPTION:VALUE.

common_option.name: --non-interactive
tip: Do not prompt the user for input.

common_option.name: --quiet
tip: Print nothing, or just summary information.
